description: A young player has been sent on loan to another team to get more playing time. A manager needs to track their progress.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the player's game statistics from their loan club.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a report of the player's minutes played, goals, and other key stats.

nodes.task_description: Request and review scouting reports from scouts who have watched the player's games.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews reports on the player's development.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary report on the player's loan spell for the head coach.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a report concluding that the loan has been successful for the player's development.
